data.body: PROGRESS — Worktree provisioned, session log started, plan reviewed. S1 (ef33) plan-review PASS (idempotent-skip, re-signed at HEAD 89aebf49) → claimable. Epic (bbf1) plan-review needs full LLM run; running in background (machine under heavy contention from other agents' concurrent review-plan calls on tickets 2599/be4e/ec20). Code surface mapped for S2: TicketTransport <- AcliClient methods (create_issue/get_issue/update_issue/add_comment/transition_issue_by_name/search_issues/add_label/set_parent + graph get_parent_map/get_comment_map/get_issuelinks_map); OutboundMapper <- outbound_fields; InboundMapper <- inbound_fields/inbound_translate; FieldSanitizer <- adapters/jira/jira_fields + comment_limits; IdentityConvention new pure object (rebar-id:{id} label; inline sites dispatch_one:320, binding_store:516, apply_inbound_records:223 write, binding_walk:341 read). S4 seam contract: _load_acli() will return select_backend(config).transport.
